description: Relay timestamp set 7200 seconds (2 hours) in the future beyond block.timestamp tolerance. This could indicate a manipulation attempt where the prover tries to extend the effective TTL of a root by backdating the relay. A conformant verifier MUST reject timestamps that exceed the future tolerance.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: relayTimestamp=1713348000 is ~2h ahead of the expected block.timestamp ~1713340800. Verifiers should enforce a future tolerance (e.g., 900 seconds / 15 minutes). The test harness should set the mock block.timestamp to 1713340800.
